2606.23533.title: POTracker: Optimizing Large Language Models for Standard-Compliant Power Outage Report Generation
2606.23533.paper_summary: Recent large language models (LLMs) are good at general text generation, but it is still hard to use them for domain-specific data generation because the output must follow strict formatting and structural rules. Unlike open-ended tasks such as question answering or translation, domain-specific generation must be both semantically correct and compliant with existing guidelines and standards. In this work, we study the nationwide interoperability problem of utility power outage reports in the United States. In practice, outage reports need to be machine-readable (e.g., JSON or XML) and must strictly follow requirements from energy-sector regulatory bodies. To address this problem, we propose POTracker, an optimized LLM for power outage report generation. We fine-tune Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct using our proposed objective. The key contribution is a new loss function, POTrackerLoss, that considers both textual similarity and structural (tag) similarity between the generated report and the ground-truth report. We evaluate POTracker on a dataset of 1,000 power outage reports and compare it with five well-known fine-tuning methods and one rule-based XML conversion method. Results show that POTracker outperforms other fine-tuning approaches, improving overall accuracy by up to 51% and reaching 86.47% structural accuracy for generated power outage reports. In addition, we conduct a human study to assess the quality of the ground-truth standard reports, where domain experts assign the generated labels an average score of 4.03 on a 0--5 scale.
2606.23533.paper_summary_zh: 最近的大型語言模型（LLMs）在一般文本生成方面表現良好，但在特定領域的數據生成中仍然很難使用，因為輸出必須遵循嚴格的格式和結構規則。與開放式任務（如問答或翻譯）不同，特定領域的生成必須在語義上正確，並符合現有的指導方針和標準。在這項工作中，我們研究了美國公用事業停電報告的全國互操作性問題。在實踐中，停電報告需要是機器可讀的（例如，JSON或XML），並且必須嚴格遵循能源部門監管機構的要求。為了解決這個問題，我們提出了POTracker，一種優化的LLM，用於停電報告生成。我們使用我們提出的目標對Qwen2.5-7B-Instruct進行微調。主要貢獻是一個新的損失函數，POTrackerLoss，它考慮生成報告與真實報告之間的文本相似性和結構（標籤）相似性。我們在1,000個停電報告的數據集上評估POTracker，並將其與五種知名的微調方法和一種基於規則的XML轉換方法進行比較。結果顯示，POTracker在微調方法中表現優於其他方法，整體準確率提高了多達51%，生成的停電報告的結構準確率達到86.47%。此外，我們進行了一項人類研究，以評估真實標準報告的質量，領域專家對生成的標籤在0到5的評分中給予了平均4.03的分數。
2606.23533.author: Hung Phan et.al.
2606.23533.authors: Hung Phan, Aniroop Naladala, Dubey Avanindra, Supryia Chinthavali, Lunga Dalton, Ali Jannesari
